items_flat.title_en: Anthropic Commits $10M CAD to Canadian AI Research
items_flat.title_zh: Anthropic 投入 1000 萬加元支持加拿大 AI 研究
items_flat.summary_en: Anthropic announced a $10 million CAD investment in Canadian AI research institutions including Amii, Mila, Vector Institute, and several universities and health organizations. The funding supports beneficial AI applications in areas like reinforcement learning, health, safety, and responsible AI. They also shared data on high Canadian adoption of Claude.
items_flat.summary_zh: Anthropic 宣布投資 1000 萬加元予加拿大 AI 研究機構，包括 Amii、Mila、Vector Institute 及多所大學與健康組織。資金用於強化學習、健康、安全及負責任 AI 等有益應用。同時分享加拿大 Claude 使用率高的數據。
items_flat.quote: Canadian institutions and researchers have played a critical role in the modern AI era... That’s why we’re committing $10 million CAD to Canadian research institutions to fund the next generation of this work.
items_flat.quote_zh: 加拿大機構與研究人員在現代 AI 時代扮演關鍵角色……因此我們承諾投入 1000 萬加元支持加拿大研究機構，資助這項工作的下一世代。

items_flat.title_en: Demis Hassabis Calls for U.S.-Led Frontier AI Oversight Framework
items_flat.title_zh: Demis Hassabis 呼籲美國主導前沿 AI 監督框架
items_flat.summary_en: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis published a call for urgent U.S.-led oversight of frontier AI models, proposing a standards body to test capabilities, develop best practices, and address risks like cybersecurity and deceptive AI as AGI approaches.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 執行長 Demis Hassabis 發文呼籲美國盡快主導前沿 AI 模型監督，建議成立標準機構測試能力、制定最佳實務，並因應網路安全與欺騙性 AI 等風險，以迎接 AGI 時代。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI Reports Explosive Growth for GPT-5.6 Sol
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol 使用量爆炸性成長
items_flat.summary_en: Sam Altman highlighted insane growth of GPT-5.6 Sol, with the inference team scaling to meet demand. OpenAI reset usage limits for Codex and ChatGPT Work reaching 8M active users. Recent updates include enhanced search and WhatsApp integration.
items_flat.summary_zh: Sam Altman 強調 GPT-5.6 Sol 成長驚人，推論團隊全力擴展以滿足需求。Codex 與 ChatGPT Work 活躍用戶達 800 萬，OpenAI 重置使用限制。最近更新強化搜尋與 WhatsApp 整合。
items_flat.quote: 5.6 sol growth is insane. the inference team has done heroic work...
items_flat.quote_zh: 5.6 sol 成長太瘋狂了。推論團隊做了英雄般的工作……

google.title_en: Demis Hassabis Calls for U.S.-Led Frontier AI Oversight Framework
google.title_zh: Demis Hassabis 呼籲美國主導前沿 AI 監督框架
google.summary_en: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis published a call for urgent U.S.-led oversight of frontier AI models, proposing a standards body to test capabilities, develop best practices, and address risks like cybersecurity and deceptive AI as AGI approaches.
google.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 執行長 Demis Hassabis 發文呼籲美國盡快主導前沿 AI 模型監督，建議成立標準機構測試能力、制定最佳實務，並因應網路安全與欺騙性 AI 等風險，以迎接 AGI 時代。

brief_en: Anthropic invests $10M CAD in Canadian AI research hubs. Google DeepMind's Demis Hassabis urges U.S.-led frontier AI oversight. OpenAI sees explosive GPT-5.6 Sol growth, hitting 8M active users for agentic tools with usage resets.
brief_zh: Anthropic 投資 1000 萬加元支持加拿大 AI 研究機構。Google DeepMind 執行長 Hassabis 呼籲美國主導前沿 AI 監督框架。OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol 使用量爆增，代理工具達 800 萬活躍用戶並重置限制。
